fn has_active_users(users: &[User]) -> bool {
    // BAD: collects into Vec just to check if empty
    let active: Vec<&User> = users.iter().filter(|u| u.is_active).collect();
    !active.is_empty()
}

fn count_admins(users: &[User]) -> usize {
    // BAD: collects into Vec just to get count
    let admins: Vec<&User> = users.iter().filter(|u| u.role == Role::Admin).collect();
    admins.len()
}

struct User {
    name: String,
    role: Role,
    is_active: bool,
}

enum Role {
    Admin,
    Member,
    Guest,
}
